guard.offline_description: We couldn't reach the server to verify your session. Check your connection and try again.
guard.error_description: We couldn't load your session. Please retry.

login.title: Sign in to ShiguangVPS
login.subtitle: Use your credentials to access the panel

error.rate_limit: Too many attempts, please try again later
error.password_length: Password must be at least 8 characters

totp.title: Two-factor verification
totp.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

setup.title: Enable two-factor authentication
setup.scan_qr: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app
setup.verify_label: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
setup.disable_description: Enter your password and current 6-digit code

recovery.title: Sign in with a recovery code
recovery.description: Enter one of your saved 8-character recovery codes (single-use)

error.invalid_or_used: Recovery code is invalid or already used

recovery_codes.title: Save your recovery codes
recovery_codes.description: These codes are shown only once. Each code may be used only once.
recovery_codes.warning: Losing these codes will lock you out if your authenticator is unavailable
recovery_codes.confirm_saved: I have safely stored these codes
recovery_codes.regenerate_warning: Regenerating will invalidate all existing recovery codes

change_password.title: Change password
change_password.error_same: New password must differ from current password

two_factor.title: Two-factor authentication
two_factor.recovery_description: Use recovery codes if your authenticator is unavailable

admin_users.title: User management
admin_users.description: Manage all user accounts in the system

form.password_hint: At least 8 characters, or leave blank to auto-generate

delete_confirm.title: Confirm user deletion
delete_confirm.description: Deleting {{username}} will cascade-delete all their subscriptions, nodes, pipelines, and related resources. This action cannot be undone.

reset_password.title: Password reset
reset_password.description: New temporary password for {{username}} (shown only once)
reset_password.confirm_saved: I have recorded the new password

disable_2fa_confirm.title: Force disable 2FA
disable_2fa_confirm.description: Disable two-factor authentication for {{username}}? This significantly reduces the security of the account.

empty.title: No users yet
empty.description: Create the first user to get started

ota.title: OTA Updates
ota.description: Update the hub binary to the latest GitHub release without leaving the dashboard.

current.title: Hub version
current.description: Reflects the running binary and the latest tag known to the OTA service.

check.up_to_date: You are running the latest release

confirm.title: Confirm upgrade
confirm.description: The hub will restart after the new binary is installed.
confirm.warning: Service will be briefly unavailable while the hub restarts. Ongoing requests are terminated.

restarting.title: Hub is restarting
restarting.description: The page will reload automatically in {{seconds}} seconds.

error.title: Upgrade failed
error.description: The upgrade did not complete. The previous binary remains in place.
